summary: Completed backend + frontend validation for AdInsight core sync, ads, analytics, explorer, and insights flows against public URL. Core requested flows are working; one integration caveat observed around insights generation during active sync.

minor.issue: Returns 409 whenever sync is running (observed during test run due ongoing auto/manual sync overlap). This is expected by code, but can block user-triggered generation unless retried later.

integration_issues.issue: UI always enables generate action and does not pre-check sync-running state, so users can encounter backend 409 conflict while sync is in progress.

action_items: Optionally gate or debounce Insights generation while /api/sync/status.sync_state.running=true to avoid avoidable 409 conflicts.
Re-run backend test for /api/insights/generate in a non-sync window to confirm deterministic 200 behavior in CI.
critical_code_review_comments: Concurrency contention exists by design: manual and auto sync share lock, and insights generation is blocked during sync. Consider product-level scheduling/UX coordination to reduce user-facing conflicts.
seed_data_creation: None (used existing synced data; also triggered manual sync via API test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL used: https://ad-tracker-13.preview.emergentagent.com. pytest run passed 6/7 with 1 skip (insights generation skipped once due sync conflict). Frontend flows (dashboard, explorer filters/table, insights display/generate) executed successfully via Playwright.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: call POST /api/sync/now, then call POST /api/insights/generate during sync window. Result: HTTP 409 with detail 'Sync is in progress'. Root cause: explicit guard in backend /api/insights/generate endpoint checking sync_state.running. Mitigation: surface sync state in Insights page and temporarily disable generate button or queue generation post-sync.
